behavior_summary: Handles the 'U8P_DEMNSTAT::look' (examine) event for the demon statue. When the player/actor looks at the statue the script marks the object with an item/info state (0x0208), applies a process-exclude operation to alter processing for that object/process, and asks the item/process to emit the short text "demon statue " (via Item::bark) so the description is presented to the player.

The routine uses the object pointer passed in (BP+06h) as the target of the set-info and the bark call, pushes the current pid as the context for the bark, frees the temporary string, and then completes by performing a small implies/pop sequence before suspending/returning.
notable_control_flow: Entry on Event 0 (U8P_DEMNSTAT::look) -> push info id 0x0208 and target object -> set info on object
Immediately follow with process-exclude opcode to change processing/delivery for the object/process
Allocate/push literal string "demon statue ", push object pointer (BP+06h) and current pid, call Item::bark to present the string
Free temporary string, perform implies/pop on retval and then suspend/return
open_questions: Exact semantics and game meaning of item/info 0x0208 (appears to mark the object as examined or alter an inspect-related state) — confidence: medium
Precise effect scope of 'process exclude' here (appears to prevent further processing or re-triggering for this object/process) — confidence: medium
Whether Item::bark always displays text to the player or can also route text to other systems (inferred to be display/speak) — confidence: medium
Whether BP+06h is strictly the object PID for the statue in all call contexts or sometimes a different context pointer (inferred to be the statue PID) — confidence: high

main_function.name: U8P_DEMNSTAT::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to the player/actor looking at the demon statue: mark the object with an info/state flag, change its processing state, and emit a short description string to the viewer via Item::bark.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_DEMNSTAT::look) — invoked when an actor looks at or examines the demon statue

function_map.name: U8P_DEMNSTAT::look
function_map.role: Handle the 'U8P_DEMNSTAT::look' event for the demon statue (set info, process-exclude, and call Item::bark to show description).

external_calls.purpose: Request the item/process to emit/display the short text "demon statue " to the player/process context. Called with the literal string, the object pointer (BP+06h), and the current pid pushed as context.

writes.name: item/info 0x0208
writes.likely_effect: Marks the target object with a specific info/state bit (appears to record 'examined' or otherwise change object state relevant to future processing).

writes.name: process exclude (opcode)
writes.likely_effect: Excludes the calling object/process from normal processing or further event delivery (prevents repeated handling or further automatic processing).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Handles the 'U8P_DEMNSTAT::look' (examine) event for the demon statue. When the player/actor looks at the statue the script marks the object with an item/info state (0x0208), applies a process-exclude operation to alter processing for that object/process, and asks the item/process to emit the short text "demon statue " (via Item::bark) so the description is presented to the player.
